scripts.build: npm run build -w @markdv/core && npm run build -w markdv && npm run build -w @markdv/web
scripts.build:cli: npm run build -w @markdv/core && npm run build -w markdv
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @markdv/core && npm run build -w @markdv/web
scripts.test: prettier --check . && npm run build:core && npm test -w markdv
